prompt: Create a cinematic, high-energy vertical advertising poster for Cheetos titled CHEESY CHAOS. A young adult woman with a messy high bun and glasses, wearing a vivid orange bomber jacket over a black top and black tactical cargo pants with straps and zippers, is frozen mid-leap toward the camera in an extreme wide-angle action pose. Her nearest arm thrusts forward in strong perspective, holding one large flaming cheese puff between her fingers; the puff glows with sparks and small flames. Keep her face unobscured and expressive, but make the motion and hand perspective the main focus. Behind her, a massive orange cheese-dust explosion erupts down a busy downtown street, sending countless crunchy cheese puffs flying through the air. The city setting should feel like a stylized Times Square diner district at golden hour, with neon diner signs, traffic, pedestrians, storefronts, and a dramatic teal-blue sky. Include exactly 4 prominent readable sign/text areas: the giant top headline “CHEESY CHAOS” made from rough orange cheese-dust texture, a left diner marquee reading “CHEESY” with tiny menu-style text below, a right vertical neon sign reading “DINER” with a small “Cheetos” sign above and “Open” below, and the bottom tagline MORE THAN A SNACK. IT’S A MOOD.. Add the Cheetos logo centered at the bottom and a product bag in the lower-right corner. Use saturated orange cheese tones contrasted with deep teal shadows, explosive particles, flying snack debris, rim lighting, cinematic depth of field, motion blur, sharp commercial-photography detail, dramatic perspective, and a glossy blockbuster snack-ad aesthetic. Avoid extra brands, avoid extra slogans, avoid malformed text, and make the poster feel chaotic but professionally composed.
